mission.title: argo-workflows: Github Sunset public key prevents artifact cloning
mission.description: Github Sunset public key prevents artifact cloning. Requested by 48+ users.

steps.title: Check current argo-workflows deployment
steps.description:
Verify your argo-workflows version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-workflows
helm list -n argo-workflows 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working argo-workflows installation.

steps.title: Review argo-workflows configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant argo-workflows configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-workflows
kubectl get configmap -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=argo-workflows
```
As of November 16, 2021 we are no longer able to clone github repositories as artifiacts without setting `insecureIgnoreHostKey: true` It appears that the go tests pass on master at least.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Github Sunset public key prevents artifact cloning
steps.description:
Update the known_hosts for GitHub's new SSH keys in your git artifact configuration. After GitHub rotated their SSH host keys, workflows using git artifacts with `knownHosts` fail with a key mismatch error. Either update the known hosts or set `insecureIgnoreHostKey: true` as a workaround.
```bash
# Error seen in executor logs:
# artifact git-repo failed to load: ssh: handshake failed: knownhosts: key mismatch
argo logs @latest | grep -i 'key mismatch'
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-workflows
kubectl get events -n argo-workflows --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Github Sunset public key prevents artifact cloning" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: Update the SSH known_hosts entries in your git artifact Secret to include GitHub's new SSH host keys. Alternatively, set insecureIgnoreHostKey: true as a temporary workaround.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with argo-workflows installed or the issue environment reproducible.
